user_query: I am a EuroMillions fan and I want to explore the draws history. Can you fetch the draw results for the specific date of March 18, 2011? Additionally, I would like a random quote in multilanguages and a random Lithuanian joke.

TaskList.description: Fetch EuroMillions draw results for the date of March 18, 2011.
Retrieve a random quote available in multiple languages.
Fetch a random joke in Lithuanian.
